data.title: BAM Capital purchases Hayden Flats, a high-end complex in Bloomington, Indiana, built in 2023.
data.description: An Indianapolis-based multifamily syndication company, BAM Capital, recently announced the successful acquisition of Hayden Flats, a high-quality apartment complex built in 2023, located in Bloomington, Indiana. This strategic acquisition marks a significant milestone for the company in expanding its portfolio within the region.

data.title: Bybit showcases Bybit Card to 45,000 festivalgoers at Tomorrowland Brasil 2025, 2nd largest crypto exchange.
data.description: At the "Portal to the Future" stage in Dubai, UAE, on October 24, 2025, Bybit Card showcased real-world crypto utility to 45,000 festival attendees. Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally in terms of trading volume, introduced the future of finance at Tomorrowland Brasil 2025, illustrating the increasing integration of cryptocurrencies into everyday transactions.

data.title: NYSE provides pre-market update on Oct 24, 2025. Kristen Scholer delivers insights from NYSE Trading Floor. Grayscale celebrates Multi Asset Crypto Fund GDLC.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) issued a daily pre-market update from the NYSE Trading Floor. Investors can access the NYSE Pre-market update for valuable market insights prior to the commencement of trading. Kristen Scholer presented the pre-market update on October 24, providing crucial information for investors. This update aims to assist traders in making informed decisions, leveraging the data shared directly from the NYSE Trading Floor. Stay informed with the latest market trends and analysis before engaging in trading activities each day.

data.title: In September, CPI edged up by 3% annually, slightly below expectations of 3.1%, reinforcing Fed rate cuts and boosting market optimism.
data.description: In September, price pressures saw a slight uptick, but not as fast as predicted, influencing the Federal Reserve's rate-cut trajectory and boosting investor confidence in the stock market. The headline Consumer Price Index (CPI) climbed by 3% compared to last year, as per the Bureau of Labor Statistics' report released after a nine-day delay due to the government shutdown. This annual increase, the highest since January, fell slightly below economists' expectations of 3.1%, only marginally surpassing August's 2.9%. On a monthly basis, the CPI grew by 0.3%, a decrease from August's 0.4% uptick and also below the consensus forecast. Excluding volatile food and energy prices, the core CPI dropped to 3%. Check out the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dow Jones up on surprise CPI inflation data. Deckers stock plunges on earnings. Live coverage by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase in value due to unexpected Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation data. Conversely, Deckers stock saw a significant decline following lower earnings. The Dow Jones index rose while Deckers stock fell as a result of these developments in the stock market.

data.title: BTC, ETH surge as inflation drops to 3% in Sept, below 3.1% forecast. Bitcoin up 2%, setting positive tone for crypto pre-Fed meeting.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin increased by 2% in response to the U.S. inflation rate falling to 3% in September, which was slightly lower than the anticipated 3.1%. This development has led to a boost in the cryptocurrency markets as investors prepare for the upcoming Federal Reserve meeting.

data.title: Willem Schroé suggests companies can earn more Bitcoin through their reserves, rivaling ETFs with rising treasuries.
data.description: Companies now hold a significant amount of Bitcoin, with reserves that are now comparable to those held in Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs). Willem Schroé, the founder of Botanix Labs, aims to transform these idle Bitcoin holdings into productive assets that generate yields.

data.title: Allied Gold closed C$175 million public equity offering.
data.description: Allied Gold Corporation has successfully concluded its overnight marketed public offering of common shares, as previously disclosed.

data.title: Solana price below $200; Digitap leads digital payments with AI and stablecoins for efficient transactions.
data.description: Solana is currently facing challenges as its price hovers below $200. Meanwhile, Digitap is gaining traction as a potential frontrunner in digital payments by utilizing AI technology and stablecoins to facilitate smooth transactions. This emergence highlights the growing importance of innovative solutions in the digital payments sector.

data.title: First TDP-43 PET tracer published in Nature Communications shows potential of AC Immune's ACI-19626 in precision medicine.
data.description: The initial characterization of a TDP-43 PET tracer has been disclosed in a publication by Nature Communications, indicating the promising capabilities of AC Immune’s ACI-19626 in the realm of precision medicine. This development marks a significant advancement in the field, offering a new tool for tracking TDP-43, a protein linked to various neurodegenerative diseases. The findings suggest that ACI-19626 could play a crucial role in enhancing diagnostic accuracy and monitoring disease progression. This achievement underscores the importance of continued research and innovation in the pursuit of more effective treatment strategies.
GOLDMAN SACHS: CPI WON’T DETER FED CUTS Goldman Sachs Asset Management said the CPI report offered no surprises for the Fed and expects rate cuts next week and in December to remain on track.

data.title: RedCloud CEO to join global leaders at FII9 after 100%+ customer growth in H1 20251, eyes Saudi market entry, AI, trade talks.
data.description: The company has experienced a remarkable customer growth of over 100% in the first half of 2051. The CEO of the company has been invited to participate in discussions on artificial intelligence, capital formation, and the future of global trade at the FII9 conference alongside other global leaders.

data.title: 3D Scanning & Printing Demo Day in NYC on Nov. 5th by Direct Dimensions & CAD BLU - free event for engineers and designers.
data.description: On November 5th, a free interactive event in New York will showcase the latest 3D technology to engineers, designers, and makers. Direct Dimensions, Inc., known for their expertise in 3D scanning and modeling, is partnering with CAD for this cutting-edge initiative. The event aims to educate participants on the innovative solutions in digital measurement. Mark your calendars for this opportunity on November 5th in New York.

data.title: AI data center stock rose 19% as earnings doubled, surpassing estimates, reaching new high early Friday.
data.description: In the third quarter, Comfort Systems reported a significant increase in earnings, more than doubling from the previous period and surpassing expectations. The company's AI data center venture experienced a substantial surge, reaching a new peak at the beginning of the week. This resulted in an impressive 19% increase in value. The performance of the AI data center play highlights the company's strong financial position and growth potential.
